overall.description: Cinematic first-person gameplay footage walking through a heavily fogged urban underpass with orange sodium lighting, transitioning to an open industrial street. The atmosphere is dense with red-orange haze, featuring occasional vehicles and pedestrians in a dystopian cyberpunk setting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy underpass approaching a figure in the distance

notable_agents.action: lone figure standing in the tunnel center, passed by the camera around the 10-second mark

entered.detail: large piles of garbage bags and debris accumulated on the left sidewalk
smooth concrete tunnel wall running along the left side
concrete tunnel wall on the right with mounted street lights
orange sodium lights mounted on the tunnel walls creating a red haze
asphalt road with lane markings visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens deep within a foggy concrete underpass illuminated by orange sodium lights. Trash piles line the left sidewalk while the camera walks forward, passing a solitary figure standing in the tunnel. The atmosphere is thick with red-orange haze and heavy industrial concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit transition with overhead overpass

events.description: vehicle approaches and passes the camera on the right side
exiting the enclosed tunnel into the open air with visible sky

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the tunnel exit as the enclosed space opens up

notable_agents.action: dark-colored car driving through the tunnel and passing the camera on the right

entered.detail: concrete archway marking the tunnel exit with bright light beyond
massive concrete overpass gantry spanning the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the tunnel exit as the space transitions from fully enclosed to semi-open. A vehicle passes on the right, and the concrete walls fall away to reveal the tunnel exit arch and massive overpass structure ahead. The orange lighting persists but the sky becomes partially visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban street with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: two pedestrians cross the street from left to right ahead of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching a crosswalk where pedestrians are crossing

notable_agents.action: two people crossing the street from left to right in front of the camera

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building with small windows and metal piping
tall street light pole with orange lamp distinct from tunnel lighting
zebra crossing markings on the road surface
vehicle parked along the left curb of the street

segments.scene_description: Having exited the tunnel, the scene opens into a wide industrial street with concrete buildings and street lamps. The camera approaches a crosswalk where two pedestrians are crossing from left to right. Parked cars line the street, and the fog continues to create a dense, atmospheric haze under the artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a foggy underpass into a wide, atmospheric industrial street. It begins deep within a concrete tunnel illuminated by orange sodium lights, passing piles of trash and a solitary figure standing amidst a thick red-orange haze. As the camera approaches the exit, the enclosed walls fall away to reveal a massive overpass structure and a partially visible sky while a vehicle passes on the right. The scene then opens fully into a broad urban expanse of concrete buildings and street lamps, moving toward a crosswalk where pedestrians cross between rows of parked cars. The journey concludes in this open industrial landscape, where the dense fog persists as a heavy, artificial glow.
